calendar.matters:
Heggstad Petition Under Probate Code Section 850 (A)(3) To Confirm Assets Belonging To Trustee Of Decedent'S Revocable Trust
Off Calendar Dec-19-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Harry Maring for and with Mark Budak (Petitioner).

The Court questioned if Heggstad applied. Mr. Maring stated that there were no debts, that all the beneficiaries had consented, and that the result would be the same. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR #11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Lewis.

Heggstad Petition Under Probate Code Section 850 (A)(3) To Confirm Assets Belonging To Trustee Of Decedent'S Revocable Trust
Off Calendar Dec-05-2007 Continued To Dec-19-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
